untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of 'ratio of current day's true range to average true range of prior two days' — this requires a custom ratio calculation not available in the allowed indicators. true_range is available but averaging prior 2 days and computing the ratio requires a derived metric (atr_7 or sma of true_range) that isn't explicitly supported. The threshold of 3.0 from source text cannot be properly implemented without this ratio metric.
translation_notes: Source text specifies ratio > 3.0 indicates news-driven shock. The allowed indicators include true_range but not a 2-day lookback ratio. atr_14 exists but represents a 14-day average, not 2-day. A backtest engine would need to support custom ratio calculations or add a 2-day ATR variant to properly translate this signal.
